channel.title: Nature Communications
channel.description:
Nature Communications is an open access, multidisciplinary journal dedicated to publishing high-quality research in all areas of the biological, health, physical, chemical and Earth sciences. Papers published by the journal aim to represent important advances of significance to specialists within each field.

We are committed to providing an efficient service for both authors and readers. Our team of independent editors make rapid and fair publication decisions. Prompt dissemination of accepted papers to a wide readership and beyond is achieved through a programme of continuous online publication.
channel.dc:rights: © 2026 Macmillan Publishers Limited, part of Springer Nature. All rights reserved.
channel.prism:copyright: © 2026 Macmillan Publishers Limited, part of Springer Nature. All rights reserved.

item.title: Prediction of strong Cu(I)–He interaction at open metal sites enables isotope-selective helium adsorption
item.content:encoded:
Nature Communications, Published online: 26 March 2026; doi:10.1038/s41467-026-70901-6

High-level electronic structure calculations reveal unusually strong interactions between Cu(I) sites and helium, enabling selective separation of helium isotopes at practical, technologically relevant temperatures.
item.dc:title: Prediction of strong Cu(I)–He interaction at open metal sites enables isotope-selective helium adsorption
item.dc:creator: Elvira Gouatieu Dongmo
Shubhajit Das
Felix Moncada
Toshiki Riemer-Wulf
Thomas Heine

item.title: Capacitive piezotronics
item.content:encoded:
Nature Communications, Published online: 26 March 2026; doi:10.1038/s41467-026-71065-z

Piezotronics are promising for mechano-sensation but limited in direct-current electronics. The authors propose the capacitive piezotronics, giving a new approach for mechanically controlled devices in high-frequency alternating-current systems.
item.dc:title: Capacitive piezotronics
item.dc:creator: Luying Xu
Zhuangzhuang Zhang
Gaobo Wang
Yixuan He
Junyi Zhai
Weiguo Hu
Libo Chen
Longfei Wang
Shuhai Liu
Zhong Lin Wang
